mapper.select: SELECT * FROM episode_source WHERE content_id = #{contentId} ORDER BY season, episode, provider
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO episode_source ( content_id, season, episode, translator_id, translator_name, provider, source_url, source_type, discovered_at, last_seen_at ) VALUES ( #{source.contentId}, #{source.season}, #{source.episode}, #{source.translatorId}, #{source.translatorName}, #{source.provider}, #{source.sourceUrl}, #{source.sourceType}, #{source.discoveredAt}, #{source.lastSeenAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id), translator_name = VALUES(translator_name), source_url = VALUES(source_url), source_type = VALUES(source_type), discovered_at = COALESCE(discovered_at, VALUES(discovered_at)), last_seen_at = VALUES(last_seen_at)
